reason: Best compactness but too coarse; recording-group stability was much weaker and it collapses distinct dynamic profiles.
Best balance of full coverage, production seed stability, recording robustness, four interpretable profiles, and manageable complexity.
Higher feature separation but lower bootstrap, seed, city, and recording stability; fifth cluster adds a less robust split.
Similar structure but slightly weaker internal metrics; scalability advantage is unnecessary for 19,948 trajectories.
Flexible probabilistic model, but substantially lower silhouette and higher Davies–Bouldin score.
Interpretable sample structure, but full 19,948-row Ward clustering is not memory-scalable and has no direct prediction for held-out cities.
High sample silhouette but one cluster is below 1% and 11.17% is noise; sensitive to density parameters.
Finds a broad density structure but leaves 39.63% as noise, so it cannot serve as the primary full-coverage profiling model.
